title: PanoramicData.NugetManagement.Web User Secrets
description: Configuration schema for user secrets used by the NuGet Management Web application.

AppSettings.description: Application settings for the NuGet Management Web tool.

GitHubOrganization.description: The GitHub organization name to manage (e.g. 'panoramicdata').

NuGetOrganization.description: The NuGet organization/owner name for package discovery (e.g. 'panoramicdata').

GitHubClientId.description: GitHub OAuth App Client ID. Create one at https://github.com/settings/developers.

CodacyApiToken.description: Optional Codacy API token for code quality checks.

LocalReposRoot.description: The local root directory where sibling repos are cloned. Defaults to the parent of the app's working directory.
